substep.title: Gather Metadata and Write
substep.action: Run `thoughts metadata` for owner, ISO timestamp, repository, branch, commit, and shared_folder. Compose the frontmatter per references/research/document-format — never use placeholders; tag with `precedent`. Prepend it to the register from step 3. Write to {shared_folder}/research/ (or output_location when provided) with filename YYYY-MM-DD_HH-MM-SS_{subject-slug}-precedent.md.

substep.title: Convert Citations to Permalinks
substep.action: If the commit is pushed (branch has an upstream, or is the default branch), convert local file:line citations to GitHub permalinks per document-format. If not pushed, keep local file:line paths. External citations stay as URLs.

substep.title: Sync
substep.action: Run `thoughts sync` so the register is discoverable by thoughts-locator on future precedent hunts.
